title: papaver alpinum subsp. degenii
intro: Papaver alpinum subsp. degenii, also known as Degen's poppy, is a plant species that belongs to the Papaveraceae family. It is primarily found in the Balkan Peninsula, particularly in Albania and Greece. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. Papaver alpinum subsp. degenii can be used to prepare various herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, which have been traditionally used to alleviate respiratory issues, soothe digestive problems, and promote relaxation, thus offering health benefits like improved breathing and reduced anxiety.
